title: HollowCraft A Hollow Knight pack
description: This is a Hollow knight recourse pack that changes things like the swords to nails, elytra to monarch wings, emeralds to geo, and many more.
body: This is my first resource pack I've made so I hope you enjoy. This pack changes many things including swords into nails, elytra into monarch wings, emeralds into geo, gold nuggets into rosaries, and more! I will update this to the newest versions when they come out as soon as I can. Other things my resource pack includes is masks instead of hearts, soul vessels instead of hunger, the experience bar is pink to be dream essence, dark gui, absorbtion hearts are lifeblood, poison is infection, hardcore hearts have a silver outline to represent steel soul mode, and more to come. I reccomend combining this with another resource pack:Torrezx-Hollow night totem, by Torrezx, this resource pack changes the totem of undying to the Knight which goes really well with this pack. Some things I plan to add in the future is spears being needles. I hope you enjoy this pack and look forward to the future of it. Again with this being my first resource pack if you enjoy please make sure to follow it to see updates for it as soon as they come out. Enjoy!
